Contact Us

Chef Cheng Kuongmeng

Premier Catering Service

Uncompromising execution for high-end corporate banquets and premium weddings in Phnom Penh.

Private Inquiry

The Execution Matrix

Uncompromised Sourcing

Rigorous cold-chain logistics bridging the gap between origin and table. We lock in the absolute freshness of premium ingredients, refusing any degradation in quality.

Flawless Orchestration

From the first table to the thousandth guest, we guarantee the optimal serving temperature and texture, conquering the complexities of massive throughput.

Medical-Grade Safety

Absolute physical isolation between raw and cooked preparations. Every hot dish surpasses the 75°C bactericidal threshold, utilizing hard data to secure well-being.

Signature Masterpieces

Assorted Premium Appetizers

A curated symphony of six premium appetizers designed to awaken the palate.

Deep-Fried Fish Fillet

Flash-fried at precise temperatures to achieve a golden crust while retaining oceanic moisture.

Authentic Khmer Beef Salad

A masterclass in balance, pairing tender beef with vibrant, citrus-infused Khmer spices.

Cereal Butter Prawns

Plump, wild-caught prawns coated in crispy cereal flakes and rich, aromatic butter.

Roasted Suckling Pig with Bread

Meticulously roasted for a glass-like crackling skin, served with soft bread for textural contrast.

Sweet & Sour Fish

Expertly carved deep-sea fish draped in an impeccably balanced sweet and sour glaze.

Spicy Stir-Fried Fish Fillet

Wok-tossed over extreme heat to impart a smoky essence and a burst of fiery aromatics.

Premium Abalone Herb Broth

A restorative elixir slow-simmered for hours, extracting the deep essence of abalone and herbs.

Spicy Duck Feet Salad

De-boned duck feet offering a crisp texture, tossed in a sharp, refreshing vinaigrette.

Steamed Fish with Premium Soy

Steamed to exact seconds to preserve delicate protein structures, finished with superior soy sauce.

Lotus Leaf Wrapped Fragrant Rice

Long-grain rice wok-fried and steamed within a lotus leaf, absorbing deep, earthy aromas.

Hong Kong Style Roast Duck

Traditional open-oven roasting renders the fat perfectly, resulting in crisp skin and succulent meat.

Royal Khmer Desserts

An elegant conclusion featuring the natural sweetness of fresh coconut milk and pandan.

Tom Yum River Prawn Soup

An intensely aromatic, spicy and sour broth featuring firm, wild-caught river prawns.

Signature Whole Roasted Pig

The centerpiece of high-end banquets, showcasing flawless roasting technique and prestige.
